en: All grown-ups were once children... but only few of them remember it.
zh: 每个大人都曾是孩子，可惜只有少数人记得。

en: The so-called bottomless abyss, once you step into it, is also a journey of ten thousand miles.
zh: 所谓无底深渊，下去，也是前程万里。

en: Man does not live in a state of nature, but in history.
zh: 人不是活在自然中，而是活在历史中。

en: To live by wit is to be harsh; to be carried away by emotion is to be swept away; to insist on one's own way is to be constrained.
zh: 发挥才智，则锋芒毕露；凭借感情，则流于世俗；坚持己见，则多方阻滞。

en: Since we cannot change the past, let us change the memories of the past.
zh: 既然我们无法改变过去，就让我们改变关于过去的记忆。

en: I prefer the absurdity of writing poems to the absurdity of not writing poems.
zh: 我偏爱写诗的荒谬，胜过不写诗的荒谬。

en: All things in the world have feelings, but the most precious is a touch of the absurd.
zh: 世间万物皆有情，难得最是荒唐。

en: Time is the river that sweeps me along, but I am the river.
zh: 时间是渡我的河，但我就是那条河。

en: We are all in the gutter, but some of us are looking at the stars.
zh: 我们都生活在深渊里，但仍有人仰望星空。

en: Death is not something to be rushed; death is a festival that will inevitably arrive.
zh: 死是一件不必急于求成的事，死是一个必然会降临的节日。

en: The past was a lie; memory has no return.
zh: 过去都是假的，回忆是一条没有归途的路。

en: What you see exists because of your imagination of it.
zh: 你看到的东西之所以存在，是因为你对它的想象力。

en: Solitude is a garden, but it contains only one tree.
zh: 孤独是一座花园，但其中只有一棵树。

en: Each man's life represents a road toward himself.
zh: 每个人的一生都是通向自我的征途。

en: Resigning myself to adversity—that is my skill, and also my sorrow.
zh: 逆来顺受，那是我的本事，也是我的悲哀。

en: The most wonderful moment of life is when you discover all the scenery is within your heart.
zh: 人生最美妙的一刻，是当你发现所有的风景都在你心里。

en: I breathe. I am. That is my reason.
zh: 我呼吸，这就是我的理由。

en: Do not take medals from your own bag to lend to your friend; it is an insult to him.
zh: 不要从你自己的袋里掏出勋章借给你的朋友，那是侮辱他。

en: One can be mediocre, but one must not be uninteresting.
zh: 人可以平庸，但不可以无趣。

en: In the midst of winter, I found there was, within me, an invincible summer.
zh: 在隆冬，我终于发现我心里有一个不可战胜的夏天。

en: Extraordinary claims require extraordinary evidence.
zh: 非凡的结论需要非凡的证据。

en: Science is the belief in the ignorance of experts.
zh: 科学就是一种对“专家们是无知的”这一事实的信念。

en: The greatest enemy of knowledge is not ignorance, it is the illusion of knowledge.
zh: 知识最大的敌人不是无知，而是对知识的幻觉。

en: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
zh: 生活中没有什么可怕的东西，只有需要理解的东西。

en: Information is what eliminates uncertainty.
zh: 信息是用来消除不确定性的东西。

en: It is not the strongest of the species that survives, nor the most intelligent; it is the one most adaptable to change.
zh: 能够生存下来的物种，不是最强的，也不是最聪明的，而是最能适应变化的。

en: What we observe is not nature itself, but nature exposed to our method of questioning.
zh: 自然界对我们所揭示的，是我们提问方式下的自然。

en: Science advances not by accumulation, but by paradigm shifts.
zh: 科学的进步并非累积，而是范式的转移。

en: Arm yourself with specific knowledge, accountability, and leverage.
zh: 用专长、责任感和杠杆武装自己。

en: You do not rise to the level of your goals. You fall to the level of your systems.
zh: 决定你成功的不是你的目标，而是你的系统。

en: All human suffering is, in essence, anger at one's own incompetence.
zh: 人的一切痛苦，本质上都是对自己无能的愤怒。

en: To grow up is not just to age, but to take responsibility for one's freedom.
zh: 成人不仅是年龄的增长，更是对自由的承担。

en: Self-restraint is the most powerful privilege a person can possess.
zh: 自我克制是一个人能拥有的最强大的特权。

en: I never lose. I either win or learn.
zh: 我从不失败，我要么赢得胜利，要么学到教训。

en: That which does not kill us makes us stronger.
zh: 那些杀不死我的，会使我更强大。

en: Man lives for the sake of living itself, not for anything outside of living.
zh: 人是为活着本身而活着的，而不是为活着之外的任何事物所活着。

en: Your brand is what other people say about you when you're not in the room.
zh: 你的品牌就是当你不在房间里时，别人对你的评价。

en: Truth is stranger than fiction, but it is because Fiction is obliged to stick to possibilities; Truth isn't.
zh: 真相比虚构更离奇，因为虚构必须符合逻辑。

en: If you've eaten an egg and found it good, why must you meet the hen that laid it?
zh: 如果你吃到一个鸡蛋觉得好吃，何必非要认识那只下蛋的母鸡呢？

en: The reasonable man adapts himself to the world; the unreasonable one persists in trying to adapt the world to himself.
zh: 理智的人使自己适应世界；不理智的人坚持让世界适应自己。

en: Life doesn't imitate art, it imitates bad television.
zh: 生命并不模仿艺术，它模仿糟糕的电视。

en: We feel free because we lack the very language to articulate our unfreedom.
zh: 我们感到自由是因为我们缺乏表达不自由的语言。

en: The world is not worth it, but you are.
zh: 人间不值得，但你值得。

en: They tried to bury us; they didn't know we were seeds.
zh: 他们试图把我们埋掉，却不知道我们是种子。

en: They say time changes things, but you actually have to change them yourself.
zh: 他们说时间改变一切，但事实上你必须自己去改变它们。

en: Beyond the necessities of life, we must have a bit of useless play and pleasure.
zh: 我们于日用必需的东西以外，必须还有一点无用的游戏与享乐。

en: What you are seeking is seeking you.
zh: 在你寻找的方向，就隐藏着你。

en: If you do not tell the truth about yourself you cannot tell it about other people.
zh: 如果不表达出真实的想法，世界就会变成一团死灰。

en: The danger of a single story is that it robs people of dignity.
zh: 单一叙事的危险在于它剥夺了人们的尊严。

en: Books are not made to be believed, but to be subjected to inquiry.
zh: 书籍在独处时给我们交谈，在喧嚣中给我们宁静。

en: If life deceives you, do not be sorrowful or impatient.
zh: 假如生活欺骗了你，不要悲伤，不要心急。

en: I have crossed many bridges, seen many clouds, and drunk many wines, but I have only loved one person in the prime of their life.
zh: 我行过许多地方的桥，看过许多次数的云，喝过许多种类的酒，却只爱过一个正当最好年龄的人。

en: I have always imagined that Paradise will be a kind of library.
zh: 我心里一直都在暗暗设想，天堂应该是图书馆的模样。

en: One word of truth shall outweigh the whole world.
zh: 一句真话比整个世界的份量还重。

en: Who talks of victory? To endure is everything.
zh: 哪有什么胜利可言，挺住意味着一切。

en: Life is a beautiful gown, crawling with fleas.
zh: 生命是一袭华美的袍，爬满了蚤子。

en: To avoid getting lost in the forest, we must remember the tiny markers.
zh: 为了在森林中不迷失方向，我们需要记住那些微小的标记。

en: In the desert, every step is both a destination and a starting point.
zh: 在沙漠中，每一步都是终点，也是起点。

en: Blindness is not being unable to see, but being unable to see what we have already seen.
zh: 盲目并不是看不见，而是看不见那些我们已经看见的东西。

en: As more people walk, the road widens, and so does the heart.
zh: 走的人多了，路也就宽了，心也就宽了。

en: Time, the devourer of all things.
zh: 时间是万物的吞噬者。

en: Until the lions have their own historians, the history of the hunt will always glorify the hunter.
zh: 只要狮子不写历史，猎人永远是英雄。

en: Work is love made visible.
zh: 工作就是显现出来的爱。

en: If there is a next life, I want to be a tree, standing in eternity, without the posture of joy or sorrow.
zh: 如果有来生，要做一棵树，站成永恒，没有悲欢的姿态。

en: This is the way the world ends, not with a bang but a whimper.
zh: 世界就是这样告终的，不是嘭的一声，而是一阵嘘声。

en: Everyone stands alone at the heart of the earth, pierced by a ray of sunlight.
zh: 每个人都孤独地站立在地球的心脏，被一道阳光刺穿。

en: I have forgotten nothing, but some things are meant only for safekeeping.
zh: 我什么也没忘，但有些事只适合收藏。

en: If you shed tears when you miss the sun, you also miss the stars.
zh: 如果你因错过太阳而流泪，那么你也将错过群星。

en: Had I not seen the Sun, I could have borne the shade.
zh: 如果我不曾见过太阳，我本可以忍受黑暗。

en: What we possess will eventually be lost; only memory endures.
zh: 拥有的总会失去，唯有记忆长存。

en: The eternal feminine draws us upward.
zh: 永恒之女性，引导我们上升。

en: Our lips still remember the shape of a kiss, and our hands the weight of labor.
zh: 我们的嘴唇还记得接吻的形状，手还记得劳动的重量。

en: Though humans are tiny and life is brief, we can learn, cultivate, and perfect ourselves.
zh: 人虽然渺小，人生虽然短促，但是人能学，能修身，能自我完善。

en: The greatest thing in the world is to know how to belong to oneself.
zh: 世界上最伟大的事，是一个人懂得如何作自己的主人。

en: Do not explain your soul to those who do not need you.
zh: 不要向不需要你的人解释你的灵魂。

en: Grass is seeding, wind is rustling its leaves. We stand together in silence; it is simply beautiful.
zh: 草在结它的种子，风在摇它的叶子，我们站着，不说话，就十分美好。

en: Many things can wait, but the child cannot.
zh: 许多事可以等待，但孩子不能。

en: Back then we had dreams—about literature, about love, about traveling across the world.
zh: 那时我们有梦，关于文学，关于爱情，关于穿越世界的旅行。

en: Everything in a person should be beautiful: the face, the clothes, the soul, and the thoughts.
zh: 人的一切都应该是美丽的：面孔，衣裳，心灵，思想。

en: It is not only for what we do that we are held responsible, but also for what we do not do.
zh: 我们不仅为自己做过的事负责，也为自己没做的事负责。

en: Life is like a long journey with a heavy burden. Never be in a hurry.
zh: 人生如负重致远，不可急躁。

en: If you can't decide, the answer is no.
zh: 如果你不能决定，答案就是不。

en: It is easy to defeat the thief in the mountains, but hard to defeat the thief in the heart.
zh: 破山中贼易，破心中贼难。

en: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
zh: 运气是当准备遇到机会时发生的。

en: Instead of looking for a job you love, first love the job you have.
zh: 与其寻找自己喜欢的工作，不如先喜欢上自己的工作。

en: We're here to put a dent in the universe.
zh: 活着就是为了改变世界。

en: The unexamined life is not worth living.
zh: 未经审视的人生是不值得过的。

en: A clear conscience is Paradise itself.
zh: 心安理得，便是极乐世界。

en: There is only one heroism in the world: to see the world as it is, and to love it.
zh: 世界上只有一种英雄主义，就是在认清生活的真相后依然热爱它。

en: Man is free, man is freedom itself.
zh: 人是自由的，人就是自由本身。

en: Pain is inevitable. Suffering is optional.
zh: 痛楚难以避免，而磨难可以选择。

en: I fear not the man who has practiced 10,000 kicks once, but I fear the man who has practiced one kick 10,000 times.
zh: 我不怕练一万种踢法的人，我怕把一种踢法练一万次的人。

en: A man can be destroyed but not defeated.
zh: 一个人可以被毁灭，但不能被战胜。

en: Do not fear the infinity of truth; every inch gained is an inch of joy.
zh: 怕什么真理无穷，进一寸有一寸的欢喜。

en: By being calm, we can diminish any misfortune.
zh: 由于沉着，我们可以把任何不幸缩小。

en: If something is important enough, even if the odds are against you, you should still do it.
zh: 如果某件事足够重要，即使几率对你不利，你仍应去做。

en: The highest realm of science is to simplify the complex.
zh: 科学的最高境界是把复杂的东西变简单。

en: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
zh: 天才是百分之一的灵感加上百分之九十九的汗水。

en: The golden age is before us, not behind us.
zh: 黄金时代就在我们面前，而不在我们背后。

en: If you can't fly, then run.
zh: 如果你不能飞，那就奔跑。

en: Set a small, achievable goal first.
zh: 先定一个能达到的小目标。

en: Iron rusts from disuse; water loses its purity from stagnation.
zh: 铁不锻炼会生锈，水不流动会腐坏。

en: Ten thousand hours is the magic number of greatness.
zh: 一万小时的锤炼是任何人从平凡变成大师的必要条件。

en: Accept things as they come; do not chase the future.
zh: 物来顺应，未来不迎。

en: Whether you think you can, or you think you can't—you're right.
zh: 无论你认为你能做到，还是不能做到，你都是对的。

en: Giving up smoking is the easiest thing in the world. I know because I've done it thousands of times.
zh: 戒烟是世界上最容易的事，我已经戒过几千次了。

en: If we don't learn from history, we are doomed to repeat it.
zh: 如果不从历史中学到教训，历史就会重演。

en: Be yourself; everyone else is already taken.
zh: 做你自己，因为别人都已经有人做了。

en: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
zh: 没有笑声的一天是浪费掉的一天。

en: Common sense is not so common.
zh: 常识并非那么平庸。

en: Only two things are infinite, the universe and human stupidity.
zh: 宇宙中唯有两件事物是无限的：宇宙和人类的愚蠢。

en: Art is the lie that enables us to realize the truth.
zh: 艺术是揭示真理的谎言。

en: Words are empty, but people are alive.
zh: 话是空的，人是活的。

en: I don't want to belong to any club that will accept me as a member.
zh: 我不愿意加入任何接受我这种人为会员的俱乐部。

en: Eighty percent of success is showing up.
zh: 80%的成功来自于出场。

en: The secret to humor is surprise.
zh: 幽默的秘密在于意外。

en: It was the best of times, it was the worst of times.
zh: 这是最好的时代，这是最坏的时代。

en: Advertising is the art of persuading people to buy things they don't need with money they don't have.
zh: 广告就是要在不被察觉的情况下让人们相信某些东西。

en: Even in the wind, keep walking with a smile.
zh: 即使在风中，也要笑着走下去。

en: If you want to make God laugh, tell him your plans.
zh: 如果你想让上帝笑，就告诉他你的计划。

en: Two things fill the mind with wonder: the starry heavens above and the moral law within.
zh: 世界上有两件东西能震撼我的心灵：头顶的星空和心中的道德律。

en: Ignorance more frequently begets confidence than does knowledge.
zh: 无知比知识更容易产生自信。

en: Facts do not cease to exist because they are ignored.
zh: 事实不因为被忽略而停止存在。

en: To be able to fill leisure intelligently is the last product of civilization.
zh: 须知参差多态，乃是幸福的本源。

en: All truths are easy to understand once they are discovered; the point is to discover them.
zh: 一切真理一旦被发现，都很容易理解，关键是发现它们。

en: I have no need of that hypothesis.
zh: 我不需要那个假设。

en: In so far as a scientific statement speaks about reality, it must be falsifiable.
zh: 不可证伪的就不是科学。

en: Chance favors the prepared mind.
zh: 机遇偏爱有准备的头脑。

en: Mathematics is the queen of sciences.
zh: 数学是科学的皇后。

en: Entities should not be multiplied without necessity.
zh: 如无必要，勿增实体。

en: We are made of starstuff.
zh: 我们都是星尘。

en: Where is everybody?
zh: 大家都去哪儿了？

en: If people do not believe that mathematics is simple, it is only because they do not realize how complicated life is.
zh: 如果人们不相信数学是简单的，那只是因为他们没有意识到生活有多复杂。

en: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.
zh: 如果你想发现宇宙的秘密，请从能量、频率和振动方面思考。

en: The pursuit of knowledge is joy.
zh: 求知是快乐的。

en: All the world's meals are but a bowl of earthly fireworks (everyday life).
zh: 四方食事，不过一碗人间烟火。

en: Life is not lacking beauty, but the eyes to discover it.
zh: 生活中不是缺少美，而是缺少发现美的眼睛。

en: I went to the woods because I wished to live deliberately.
zh: 我步入丛林，因为我希望生活得有意义。

en: The pleasure we derive from journeys is perhaps dependent more on the mind-set with which we travel.
zh: 旅行的意义在于它能改变我们的心境。

en: Only those who love children can educate them.
zh: 只有爱孩子的人，他才可以教育孩子。

en: Happiness is sleeping in your own bed and eating your parents' home-cooked meals.
zh: 幸福就是：一是睡在自家的床上，二是吃父母做的饭菜。

en: We cannot extend the length of life, but we can increase its width.
zh: 我们不能延长生命的长度，但可以增加它的宽度。

en: When a man is tired of London, he is tired of life.
zh: 如果你厌倦了伦敦，你就厌倦了生活。

en: When the heart is small, trifles become huge; when the heart is large, mountains become small.
zh: 心小了，所有的小事就大了；心大了，所有的大事都小了。

en: Play is the work of childhood.
zh: 玩耍是工作的开始。

en: It's no use crying over spilt milk, because all the forces of the universe were bent on spilling it.
zh: 打翻了牛奶，哭也没用，因为宇宙间的一切力量都在止不住地让它打翻。

en: Life is not what one lived, but what one remembers and how one remembers it in order to recount it.
zh: 生活不是我们活过的日子，而是我们记住的日子。

en: A person often meets his destiny on the road he took to avoid it.
zh: 人往往在逃避命运的路上遇到命运。

en: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.
zh: 最好的时间是十年前，其次是现在。

en: A smile costs nothing, but gives much.
zh: 笑容不花一分钱，却价值连城。
